query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.cart_items (
                id, cart_id, tenant_id, product_id,
                quantity, unit_price_nanodollar,
                created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                quantity = VALUES(quantity),
                unit_price_nanodollar = VALUES(unit_price_nanodollar),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
